positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical linocut illustration of entangled botanical elements and celestial bodies. The composition features stylized tropical foliage (monstera, fern) intertwined with a glowing crescent moon and delicate star constellations. The artwork must use a restricted, two-tone palette of deep indigo black on a crisp white background. The style is reminiscent of vintage woodcuts and etching, emphasizing clean silhouettes, thick graphic lines, and extreme contrast. Central, balanced composition, designed purely for scalable apparel printing, minimalist, detailed line art, no gradients, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient, muddy colors, photo, realistic, sketch, digital painting
